title: No Filter Needed
productionNotes: Open with bright steel pan melody and crisp dancehall drums—snappy snare on 3, kick pattern syncopated with reggaeton undertones. Layer warm synth pads in A major with occasional dembow rhythm breaks. Production should feel sun-soaked and spacious, mixing rootsy percussion (shakers, congas) with modern pop sheen—clean but organic. Bridge strips to hand drums and vocals before explosive final chorus with horn stabs and crowd energy. Mix the baritone vocals forward and proud, minimal reverb to emphasize presence and intimacy.
intro:
Steel pan melody, hand claps
Yeah yeah, Ital Phoenix
Look inna di mirror now
See Jah light reflect, ayy
verse1:
Mi never need Valencia fi shine bright so
No Nashville filter 'pon mi soul, no
Babylon try teach mi fi edit mi existence
But mi melanin a glow wid di righteous persistence
Dem say retouch yuh face, blend out yuh space
But mi ancestors never fake dem embrace
Natty dread crown, no straightening iron
Authentic from birth, mi a natural Zion
prechorus:
Swipe left di lie, tap out di disguise
Mi beautiful as Jah create, recognize
No more hiding behind di screen facade
Mi walking inna mi truth, blessed by God
chorus:
No filter needed, mi born complete
Every scar and curve a make mi unique
No filter needed, original design
When yuh love yuhself, yuh naturally shine
No filter needed, no filter needed
This a me, and mi proud fi show it
No filter needed, no filter needed
Authenticity a di greatest achievement
verse2:
Remember when mi scroll and feel inadequate?
Compare mi journey to dem curated packet
But den mi hear di drum, ancestral wisdom talk
Say child yuh never need permission fi walk
Di algorithm want fi box mi inna trend
But mi spirit too wild, mi nah pretend
From digital captivity mi finally free
Mi face to di sun, just grateful fi be me
bridge:
Inna dis world of illusion and edit
Mi choose fi stand bare, give Jah all di credit
Mi stretch marks tell story of growth
Mi voice crack wid passion, mi live both
Perfection a prison, liberation a raw
Mi imperfect and perfect, no flaw inna Jah law
So mi delete di app weh distort mi reflection
And embrace every inch wid divine affection
outro:
Steel pan fades with hand drums
Just me, just we, just free
No filter needed, inna A major key
Ital Phoenix, unedited legacy
Selah
promptForSuno: Afro-Caribbean pop dancehall with reggaeton influence, 95 BPM, A major, male deep warm baritone Jamaican patois vocals, authentic dancehall rhythm, bright steel pan melody, syncopated reggaeton dembow drums, crisp snare on 3, layered synth pads, organic hand percussion, shakers and congas, sun-soaked production, clean modern pop mix with rootsy elements, confident celebratory energy, self-love anthem, horn stabs in final chorus, minimal reverb on lead vocals for intimacy, liberated joyful vibe, commercial dancehall pop crossover
